name: sse-parser
description: A Rust-powered streaming Server-Sent Events parser for Node.js and the browser.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && tsdown && pnpm run copy:wasm
scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --target web --typescript --out-dir wasm/pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/sse_parser.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:dev: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --target web --typescript --out-dir wasm/pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/sse_parser.wasm
scripts.copy:wasm: rm -rf dist/wasm && mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp -R wasm/pkg dist/wasm/pkg
scripts.lint: oxlint --tsconfig tsconfig.json --type-aware --type-check index.ts parser.ts types.ts wasm-loader.ts scripts test
scripts.format: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json tsdown.config.ts vitest.config.ts index.ts parser.ts types.ts wasm-loader.ts scripts test
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json tsdown.config.ts vitest.config.ts index.ts parser.ts types.ts wasm-loader.ts scripts test
